---
name: Extension Proposal
about: Propose an extension to the SNAB specification.
title: "[PROPOSAL] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

<!-- SEE PROPOSALS.MD FOR REFERENCE ON WHAT THIS MEANS -->

# Abstract

*Short, two paragraph summary of your proposal. Tag relevant authors, be concise. Readers should know exactly what your proposal consists of by the end of this section.*

**Keywords:** *comma separated list of keywords that others can search for to find your proposal. Avoid using names, acronyms, and proper nouns. Include no more than ten words.*

**Impacted languages:** *comma separated list of language identifiers which are affected by your proposal. Use code fences, escape non-ASCII characters.* (e.g. `CS\x00\x00`)

# Existing implementations

*Bullet list of all existing implementations of your proposed extension. Can consist of multiple programming languages. Use Markdown links with repository names and URLs.* ***YOU MUST LIST AT LEAST TWO RELEVANT IMPLEMENTATIONS THAT PERTAIN TO MORE THAN ONE AUTHOR TOTAL.***

# Explanation & Justification

*Describe in as much detail as possible the contents of your proposal. Include details such as how endianness and compression impact the extension. Justify the necessity of your proposal, include references to external code & concepts, and credit authors.*
